wordplay_note: One of the group trapped in subjective realities
card_description: Arthur Silvester is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Eye in the Sky*. Member of the bevatron accident group. Name note: One of the group trapped in subjective realities. Each character represents a different pathology of worldview. First appears in *Eye in the Sky*.

reference.brief: Member of the bevatron accident group
reference.significance: Each character represents a different pathology of worldview
